arts.ttl: Exclusive: The Arsenal player easing concerns about the club’s lack of January signings
arts.sum: Arsenal clearly have a real wonderkid on their hands in the form of Ethan Nwaneri, so can he be the answer to their issues in attack while Bukayo Saka is out injured? The Gunners may have thrashed reigning champions Manchester City 5-1 at the weekend, but they’ve had a few games this season where they’ve […] The post Exclusive: The Arsenal player easing concerns about the club’s lack of January signings appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal drop double team news hint for Newcastle as huge Mikel Arteta decision 'confirmed'
arts.sum: As Arsenal are out of the FA Cup, following this game Arteta and his players will have a 10-day break, a portion of which will be spent in Dubai, before returning to Premier League action at Leicester City. With that in mind, Arteta will likely name a strong team and two of the names in his starting XI could have just been confirmed.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United chiefs respond to fan demand as sought after Adidas shirt 'back in stock'
arts.sum: Newcastle United chiefs have restocked the Adidas originals "retro" style shirt after incredible demand from the Toon fanbase. The long-sleeved retro shirts were on sale for £85 but the club had grown concerned at the amount of items that had made their way on to the black market and on to eBay as more sinister buyers looked to make a quick buck.

arts.ttl: Source: Galatasaray keen on Newcastle's Trippier
arts.sum: Galatasaray are pushing to sign Newcastle United defender Kieran Trippier, a source has told ESPN.

arts.ttl: ‘Total opposite’: Ian Wright says one area of Liverpool’s squad is so much better than Arsenal’s
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool look like they will be the two teams contending to win the Premier League this season. Gary Neville thinks Arsenal can win...

arts.ttl: Why Ethan Nwaneri is Not Allowed in Arsenal's Dressing Room
arts.sum: Despite becoming instrumental in Arsenal and Mikel Arteta's pursuit of silverware, youngster Ethan Nwaneri is unable to prepare alongside teammates.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's 'emotional' stadium call as PIF motivation to be unlocked
arts.sum: There are obvious caveats, given that Spurs are a London club, but the Lilywhites generated €123m (£103.1m) in match day income in 2024, according to Deloitte, as well as €297m (£249m) in commercial revenue with the help of the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, which has staged big-name concerts, become the official home of the NFL in the UK and played host to the first F1 branded electric karting experience in the world. Although Newcastle generated €68m (£57m) in match day income last year, according to Deloitte, and €90m (£75.5m) in commercial revenue, these figures pale in comparison to the established order.

arts.ttl: ‘It’s pathetic’: Ian Wright ‘can’t believe’ what people have been saying about one Arsenal player now
arts.sum: Arsenal beat Manchester City 5-1 at the weekend in what was perhaps the Gunners’ best Premier League result in a decade. Arsenal dominated the current...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United £1.2bn stadium announcement 'worth the wait' as club chiefs close to decision
arts.sum: Chronicle Live understands that a final decision has not been made on the location of a site away from St James' Park just yet and that the club remain in discussions with Newcastle City Council on their next move. What is now very clear on Tyneside is that an improved capacity and stadium will help generate the funds needed to compete on the field after three barren transfer windows in a row.
